settings.title: Context Bro Settings
sites.description: Configure which websites to share and how.
sites.name: Name
sites.empty: No sites configured. Add domains or use a preset to get started.
sites.focusedTabDesc: Captures when focused. Enable Refetch for pages that update over time.
sites.anyTabDesc: Periodically captures all matching tabs in background.
endpoints.description: Configure API endpoints where page context will be sent.
endpoints.name: Endpoint name
templates.description: Define templates that control the JSON payload shape. Use {{variables}} for dynamic values.
templates.name: Template name
general.keyboardDesc: Press {shortcut} to share the current selection.
general.keyboardCustomize: You can customize this shortcut in your browser's extension settings.
general.aboutDesc: Context Bro — Web Clipper for AI Agents.
general.aboutTagline: Your AI's eyes on the web.
general.guideDesc: Learn how to set up allowlist rules and auto-capture schedules.
livestream.description: Configure how live stream chat and transcripts are captured and sent.
livestream.deliveryDesc: Choose which endpoints receive live stream data and customize the JSON payload.
livestream.endpointsNone: No endpoints selected — data will not be sent
livestream.chatTemplateDesc: JSON template for chat batch payloads. Use {{variables}} for dynamic values.
livestream.quietPeriodHint: Send after no new messages for this duration.
livestream.maxDelayHint: Force send after this time, even if messages keep arriving.
livestream.samplingHint: Messages below this threshold are sent without sampling.
livestream.transcriptHint: Progressive tracking sends only new segments as the video plays.
livestream.checkEveryHint: How often to look for new transcript segments.
